subcodes.first_line: Verily, this Tablet shineth betwixt heaven and earth, and through it hath the Spirit descended, and the Faithful Spirit hath proclaimed that they who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اللوح یلوح بین السموات و الارض و به نزل الروح و نطق الروح الامین ان الذین
